headline: OPENAI STILL DARK ON GPT-5.6 24H AFTER FABLE 5; TIMELINE PINS RELEASE TO JUNE 22-23 FREE-WINDOW CLIFF
VIRAL 'POLYMARKET 76% GPT-5.6 NEXT WEEK' DEBUNKED — THAT 76% IS THE OPENAI-IPO-BEFORE-2027 MARKET, NOT A RELEASE BET
FABLE 5 PRICING CIRCULATING AT $10/M INPUT, $50/M OUTPUT — ~2X OPUS 4.8; FREE FOR PAID TIERS ONLY UNTIL JUNE 22
ABACUS.AI CEO BINDU REDDY: CLAUDE FABLE 5 'OVERTHINKS,' IS 'DEFINITELY NOT YOUR EVERYDAY MODEL'
ANTHROPIC GOES SILENT ~24H POST-LAUNCH — NO OFFICIAL WORD ON WHAT HAPPENS TO FABLE 5 PRICING AFTER JUNE 22
